name: Vue.js
description: A progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces. Vue is designed from the ground up to be incrementally adoptable, making it easy to integrate with existing projects while scaling to complex single-page applications.
advantages: Gentle learning curve with clear documentation
Reactive data binding simplifies state management
Single-file components keep templates, logic, and styles together
Strong ecosystem including Pinia, Vue Router, and Nuxt
disadvantages: Less corporate backing than React or Angular
Breaking changes between Vue 2 and Vue 3
Fewer job opportunities in some markets
